name: Containerize a Python API for Kubernetes
description: A FastAPI backend that currently runs on a single EC2 instance needs to move to Kubernetes for horizontal scaling. Includes Postgres, Redis cache, and a background worker.
task: Containerize a FastAPI backend and deploy it to Kubernetes. The app has: uvicorn API server, Celery background worker, Redis, Postgres. Produce: (1) a multi-stage Dockerfile optimized for production, (2) Kubernetes manifests for Deployment, Service, HPA, ConfigMap, Secret, (3) a health check endpoint setup, (4) a rollout strategy (max surge/unavailable), (5) resource requests and limits. Show the actual YAML and Dockerfile.
